blocks.name: Send WhatsApp Text
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || ''); const token = String(b.getValue('token') || ''); const number = String(b.getValue('number') || ''); const text = String(b.getValue('text') || ''); const target = String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult'); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/text', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', text: ${JSON.stringify(text)} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Send WhatsApp Image
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || ''); const token = String(b.getValue('token') || ''); const number = String(b.getValue('number') || ''); const imageUrl = String(b.getValue('imageUrl') || ''); const caption = String(b.getValue('caption') || ''); const target = String(b.getValue('target') || 'waResult'); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/send/image', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' }, body: JSON.stringify({ number: '${number}', url: ${JSON.stringify(imageUrl)}, caption: ${JSON.stringify(caption)} }) }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA image sent to ${number}', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Get WhatsApp Status
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || ''); const token = String(b.getValue('token') || ''); const target = String(b.getValue('target') || 'waStatus'); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/status', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA status: ' + JSON.stringify(d), 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Get WhatsApp QR Code
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || ''); const token = String(b.getValue('token') || ''); const target = String(b.getValue('target') || 'waQr'); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/qr', { method: 'GET', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('QR retrieved', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }

blocks.name: Logout WhatsApp
blocks.exportCode: function(b) { const serverUrl = String(b.getValue('serverUrl') || ''); const token = String(b.getValue('token') || ''); const target = String(b.getValue('target') || 'waLogout'); return `const ${target} = await (async () => { try { const r = await fetch('${serverUrl}/logout', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'token': '${token}' } }); const d = await r.json(); if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA logged out', 'info'); return d; } catch(e) { if(window.__addLog) window.__addLog('WA error: ' + e.message, 'error'); return { error: e.message }; } })();`; }
